scenario: project member reads private in-scope file
notes: Internal access allows same-organization members; download/delete endpoints typically use 404 to avoid leaking existence

scenario: external collaborator reads explicitly shared file
observed_result: Allowed after explicit FileShare (object-level read check returns True)
notes: Restricted access requires an active share to user or organization with can_download=True

scenario: collaborator attempts to delete shared file
notes: Shared users cannot delete unless they are org owner/admin for a share-to-organization case

scenario: user requests file outside approved storage path
observed_result: Denied or sandboxed (invalid log path -> 400; invalid outdir -> falls back to base downloads dir)
notes: Prevents path traversal / absolute-path escape for job logs and download output directory

scenario: child resource is broader than parent policy
observed_result: Denied/enforced (upload into organization folder forces Restricted; Internal/Public rejected)
notes: Most-restrictive precedence: organization folders enforce Restricted visibility
